FINAL_RESULT:
  UUID: 60b76ba6-0715-42d9-aaba-f9ecb7b969db
  PREDICTED_SMILES: O=S(=O)(c2ccc1ccccc1c2)N(Cc3ccc(cc3)[N+](=O)[O-])CCC(=O)C
  CONFIDENCE: 0.95
  REASON_BRIEF: The HRMS and molecular formula fit a tertiary sulfonamide with a naphthalene core, p‑nitrobenzyl substituent, and a 3‑oxobutyl side chain. ¹H NMR shows the p‑nitrobenzyl CH₂ (4.76 ppm), an N‑CH₂‑CH₂‑CO‑CH₃ chain (3.36, 2.31, 1.82 ppm), and 11 aromatic protons for the nitrophenyl and naphthalene rings. The ¹³C NMR confirms a ketone (206.4 ppm) and the aliphatic CH₂/CH₃ signals, matching the proposed structure.
